input_sentence: Older psychological texts often linked non-normative gender expression in children to future homosexual or transgender identity.
raw_output: {"category": "False Causality", "severity": "Outdated", "explanation": "This reflects an outdated and speculative link between childhood gender expression and adult sexual orientation or gender identity."}
